item.title: Middle East war: US launches fresh strikes on Iran after helicopter shot down
item.description: The attack puts a major strain on a ceasefire agreement that has yet to lead to ongoing peace.

item.title: Outbreak of rare Ebola strain in Congo kills 100th person as local protests rage
item.description: Authorities are struggling to provide aid to the war-torn region due to local protests.

item.title: Katy Perry and Justin Trudeau smitten during first red carpet appearance at Tribeca Film Festival
item.description: The loved-up pair fronted the media for the pop star’s latest premiere.

item.title: Serena Williams steals Queen’s show in stunning return to tennis
item.description: The returning champ has left commentators in awe, with one part of her game ‘looking better than ever’.

item.title: Chinese rocket seen across NSW and Queensland as glowing plume sparks confusion
item.description: Theories flooded social media after a glowing object lit up the sky before experts revealed the truth behind the spectacle.

item.title: Katie Lolas’ cheap and easy family meals that won’t break the budget
item.description: From a cheesy beef pasta bake to a hearty lentil and rice dish, Katie Lolas proves affordable dinners can still be full of flavour.

item.title: Tributes emerge after beloved student Cody Breen killed in motorbike crash
item.description: ‘A life ended far too soon doing what he loved the most.’

item.title: Man accused of stabbing woman to death on North Carolina train found not fit for trial
item.description: Video of the alleged unprovoked attack shocked the world.

item.title: SA roof squatter discovery triggers urgent government action
item.description: The premier has labelled the incident as ‘startling’.

item.title: Knife attack sparks anti-immigrant violence across Belfast
item.description: Mobs have stormed neighbourhoods in Northern Ireland after a Sudanese national was accused of an attempted beheading.

item.title: Hong Kong lays manslaughter charges over deadly blaze
item.description: The massive blaze engulfed seven apartment buildings and killed 168 people.

item.title: Sardines become latest superfood trend as social media influencers spark shopping frenzy
item.description: They're cheap, they're tinned, and they're flying off supermarket shelves.

item.title: ‘Unrest is not welcome’: victim's family urges calm after Belfast knife attack
item.description: ‘We do not want this terrible tragedy to be used to divide people or fuel hostility.’

item.title: Viral Nonna Teresa reveals her family recipe for comforting chicken and vegetable soup
item.description: Warm up with a bowl of Nonna Teresa’s comforting chicken and vegetable soup before finishing with her crowd-favourite Nutella crescent biscuits.

item.title: Hero golden retriever leads owner to injured dog by following trail of blood
item.description: A routine evening walk took an unexpected turn.

item.title: Miracle play helps New York Knicks complete greatest comeback in NBA Finals history
item.description: The Knicks are one win away from glory after the Spurs blew a 29-point lead.

item.title: Coolangatta Pie Shop to close after 62 years as rising costs force iconic Gold Coast bakery to shut
item.description: Generations of locals have shared their memories as the beloved institution prepares to serve its final pie.

item.title: Suspended Queensland surgeon Reza Adib slammed by coroner over death of patient after gastric bypass
item.description: A coroner found the patient may still be alive had she not been discharged from hospital.

item.title: Luxury apartments open on former Toowong cancer cluster site in Brisbane nearly 20 years after evacuation
item.description: Despite years of investigations, the cause still remains unknown.

item.title: Nick Kyrgios comeback stumbles against Japanese qualifier Sho Shimabukuro in Stuttgart
item.description: ‘I think we should hold you accountable.’

item.title: Middle East war: Trump calls off strikes on Iran citing breakthrough in peace negotiations
item.description: The reversal comes after the US launched a barrage of airstrikes in retaliation to an Iranian attack.

item.title: Why the Socceroos’ next golden generation is closer than you think
item.description: Aussie legend Mark Schwarzer has identified a number of stars ready to make their mark at the World Cup.

item.title: Labor and Liberal politicians in fiery clash as One Nation raises millions in snap fundraiser
item.description: Pauline Hanson has called in the auditors after her Fire The Liar campaign raked in $2.7 million.

item.title: Model and TV star Chrissy Teigen shares heartbreaking news of her father’s death
item.description: ‘I’ve thought about this call for years.’

item.title: Rhylee Stephen bares soul for partner, Matthew Bielefeld, after fatal accident in Finke Desert Race
item.description: Matthew Bielefeld’s ‘soulmate’ has shared painful details about the race, and a trophy she’s keeping close to her heart.

item.title: Yarrabilba bakery attack: Teen charged after Rainbow Bakery owner Long Kry allegedly struck with rock
item.description: The breakthrough comes days after confronting footage emerged from the violent incident.

item.title: New Zealand cricket legend Kane Williamson calls time on glittering career mid-series
item.description: One of the modern greats of the game has announced his retirement, effective immediately.

item.title: Locals fighting AI data centre expansion plans near their Melbourne homes
item.description: Locals claim the proposal would make it harder to live in the suburban community.

item.title: Young Aussie’s advice after switching to a ‘dumbphone’ and escaping modern technology: ‘Destroy it’
item.description: Despite losing a majority of his connections, he says his life improved.

item.title: Concerns raised over new TGA regulations for therapy using MDMA and magic mushrooms
item.description: The changes could set back progress made with the world-leading treatment, says an expert.

item.title: Elon Musk crowned world’s first trillionaire as SpaceX skyrockets in Wall Street debut
item.description: The South African tech mogul has amassed more wealth than the GDP of all but 21 countries.

item.title: Hilarious moment elephant pees all over floor at Texas Republican rally
item.description: The animal was led through the rally ahead of a hotly-contested political race.

item.title: Hero lifesaver reveals moment he pulled shark attack victim from Sydney’s Coogee Beach
item.description: ‘Once I had her next to me, I was just going, keep your head above water, keep breathing.’

item.title: Protesters crash Pauline Hanson’s Melbourne fundraiser as she eyes Victoria election
item.description: Hanson labelled Victoria’s Labor government ‘toxic’ as demonstrators rallied outside her event.

item.title: Cooked Scampi Shrimp Head-On Shell-On recalled in Victoria over chemical contamination risk
item.description: Eating this product could cause illness or injury.

item.title: 7NEWS The Issue Podcast: One Nation is leading primary polling as analysts say it will shake the two-party stronghold
item.description: Analysts warn the old political duopoly is crumbling and a volatile, unpredictable election future is taking shape.

item.title: Australians warned as scammers use artificial intelligence to crack passwords faster than ever
item.description: Think your password is safe? Think again.

item.title: Aussies send powerful message against South Africa to start T20 World Cup on a high
item.description: Georgia Wareham made important runs with the bat before taking over with the ball and in the field.

item.title: Donald Trump says Strait of Hormuz will be ‘open’ with peace deal a day away, but Iran seem less certain
item.description: An initial plan is due to be signed on Sunday, says US President Donald Trump and mediators from Pakistan, but Iran seems less certain.

item.title: Maria Eduarda Rodrigues de Freitas: Woman thrown 40m to her death after staff forget to attach safety rope
item.description: Horrifying footage has emerged of a 21-year-old woman being thrown to her death after staff allegedly failed to attach a safety line during a rope jump. Warning: Disturbing content

item.title: Tommy Fury and Molly-Mae reveal son’s name before boxing match win
item.description: Molly-Mae had hinted the much-anticipated name reveal would come during Fury’s bout.

item.title: Driver killed in Australian motorsport tragedy at Calder Park
item.description: Emergency services were called to the racetrack but the competitor tragically died at the scene.

item.title: Pakistani official arrested after Hania Ahmed fatal shooting, two robbers killed in police encounter
item.description: According to local media reports, an officer has since been arrested and charged with allegedly killing the girl and seriously injuring her father and brother.

item.title: Jalen Brunson leads New York Knicks to historic NBA title over Victor Wembanyama’s San Antonio Spurs
item.description: The Knicks have finally ended their 53-year championship drought with another thriller against San Antonio.

item.title: Why this pilot says it’s OK to change careers in your 30s
item.description: ‘It was the best thing I’ve ever done.’

item.title: US President Donald Trump mulls inaugural flight of new Air Force One at Mount Rushmore July 4 event
item.description: The jet was a controversial gift from Qatar.

item.title: Police called almost daily to Adelaide’s Novar Gardens Housing Trust complex as crime surges
item.description: A grandmother lives in fear of drug users as police attend daily callouts.

item.title: Young Australians are ditching social media for real-world connections and friendships
item.description: Tired of endless scrolling and feeling lonelier than ever? You're not alone.

item.description: US authorities are working to determine the cause of the crash.

item.title: US singer Oliver Tree aboard helicopter involved in fatal mid-air collision
item.description: The 32-year-old was on the list of passengers, according to police.

item.title: Oscar Piastri ‘collapse’ in spotlight as Lewis Hamilton fulfils Ferrari dream with Barcelona Grand Prix victory
item.description: The Aussie ‘has taken a bit of a plunge’ and the F1 world is taking notice of the ‘strange’ situation.

item.title: Emerging star Cooper Connolly suffers crushing end to massive knock after body goes into ‘shock’
item.description: The 22-year-old was ‘quite upset’ with himself when he suddenly struggled to move just moments from securing victory.

item.title: Trump confirms peace deal between US and Iran: ‘Let the oil flow’
item.description: The US president has ordered a naval blockade on the Strait of Hormuz be lifted.

item.title: Giant-killing world No.76 Kamil Majchrzak ‘too good’ for Alex de Minaur in ATP s’Hertogenbosch final
item.description: Australia’s world No.6 was powerless to stop himself from becoming the new champion’s third top-10 victim in three days.

item.description: Local authorities believe the number of cases may be higher as ongoing conflict has hampered contact tracing efforts.

item.description: Here are the top plans you will want to lock in.

item.title: Push to keep wife killer Gerard Baden-Clay behind bars for life under parole reforms
item.description: ‘He’s a heinous killer, he’s never shown remorse and he should never be released.’

item.description: Sardine-maxxing is taking over social media, and Sarah Di Lorenzo is showing how to turn the trending fish into delicious, family-friendly meals.

item.description: The 35-year-old mother was attacked on Saturday afternoon.

item.description: ‘Everybody just keeps discounting Australia and it seems to be not the right thing to do.’

item.description: The veteran leader initially bounced back well from brain and heart surgery but now his future is uncertain once again.

item.description: The 46-year-old will spend close to a year behind bars after being convicted on 12 charges.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: 7NEWS live updates: Chaos as midair emergency on Virgin flight sparks urgent landing
item.description: Follow along as we bring you all of the big crime, traffic and weather updates.

item.title: ‘Not survivable’: Eight feared dead after B-52 bomber crashes at US Air Force base
item.description: Shocking footage from the crash site shows a pillar of black smoke wafting into the sky.

item.title: Major health update from legendary singer Bonnie Tyler as she wakes from induced coma
item.description: The hitmaker has cancelled or postponed all her remaining shows this year.

item.title: Confusion as Tunisia announce coach Sabri Lamouchi sacked one game into FIFA World Cup
item.description: Uncertainty strangely remains despite the country releasing a categoric statement that he has been axed.

item.title: World Cup minnows Cape Verde stun favourites Spain in debut for the ages
item.description: The all-time underdogs registered their first ever World Cup points with a player they recruited from LinkedIn.

item.title: Aussie sprint king Lachie Kennedy outlines lofty goals at Commonwealth Games
item.description: The 22-year-old superstar is targeting more than the 100m title next month.

item.title: Australian World Cup referee Shaun Evans cleared by FIFA over symbol controversy
item.description: Shaun Evans has offered his ‘only explanation’ after being accused of referencing white supremacy.

item.title: Google Gemini coming to Cadillac range, Chevrolet Corvette in Australia
item.description: General Motors has commenced rolling out its clever Gemini AI assistant to more than half its local lineup.

item.title: Newsagency addresses ‘$100 million secret’ as massive Powerball prize remains unclaimed
item.description: The winning ticket was purchased more than a year ago.

item.title: Who left Farmer Wants A Wife? Five women exit the show in shock departures
item.description: Some of the women confessed the bombshell reasons behind their decision.

item.title: A girl ‘erased’: inquest seeks answers over killing of 10-year-old
item.description: The parents of a girl killed by a teenager hope an inquest will help victims of crime and their families avoid a similar nightmare.

item.title: Kane Cornes adds Western Bulldogs younster Ryley Sanders to controversial ‘roadblocks’ list
item.description: ‘Every time he gets the footy, his natural instinct is to go backwards.’

item.title: New Hyundai i20 revealed with SUV-inspired styling
item.description: Hyundai has launched a new i20 overseas with a fresh SUV-inspired design and updated tech.

item.title: Dustin Martin and Cyril Rioli headline star-studded Four’N Twenty Legends Game teams
item.description: The iconic fundraising match is returning bigger and better than ever in 2026.

item.title: VicRoads CEO apologises as website outage enters second week
item.description: Disruptions to the VicRoads website have spilled into a second week, with its CEO apologising after finally fronting the media.

item.title: Sharks’ injury list grows again with star prop Toby Rudolf sidelined for a month
item.description: The prop will miss up to a month with a knee injury.

item.title: Genesis reveals more of its V8-powered Magma GT supercar
item.description: The Genesis Magma GT concept edges closer to production with the reveal of a striking analogue-focused interior.

item.title: Sunrise’s Edwina Bartholomew opens up about the ‘toughest time’ her family faced
item.description: The Sunrise host said one life-changing move helped turn everything around.

item.title: Australia's richest woman in $1.4bn deal with Elon Musk
item.description: ‘Elon has done what very few people in history have done.’

item.title: Sarah Tuck’s Japanese beef udon is the cosy dinner everyone will want this winter
item.description: Warm up with this comforting bowl of beef, noodles and flavour-packed broth.

item.title: Geelong coach reveals fresh injury issue for Jeremy Cameron, remains coy on Tom Stewart
item.description: The superstar is battling multiple ailments ahead of Thursday night’s blockbuster.

item.title: 2026 CarExpert Choice winner: Best Luxury Mid-Size SUV
item.description: Distinctive styling inside and out, standout technology and classic BMW dynamic excellence make the X3 a winner.

item.title: American shock jock Mike Grella doubles down on Socceroos criticism as Dan Gorringe drawn in
item.description: The US pundit is standing by his Socceroos take-down despite his colleagues distancing themselves from it.

item.title: Bungee jumper thrown 40m from bridge without rope was still alive when found by nurse
item.description: She has revealed the comforting final moments she shared with the 21-year-old.

item.title: Heartbreak as New Zealand denied first win in World Cup history
item.description: The All Whites took the lead twice, but fell short of their first ever win.

item.title: Australia Post’s plea to pet owners as dog attacks reach alarming numbers
item.description: ‘What seems like a routine delivery can quickly escalate ...’

item.title: Lincraft to close all physical stores in Australia and New Zealand as part of digital shift
item.description: Customers were informed of the major development in an email.

item.title: Hero surf lifesaver Charlie Verco weighs in on shark culling after rescuing Sydney mother Leah Stewart
item.description: The surf lifesaver helped bring Leah Stewart to shore after she was bitten by a great white shark.

item.title: RBA interest rates: Reserve Bank holds cash rate at 4.35 per cent in relief for Australian borrowers
item.description: A fourth consecutive rate hike would have turned the dial up to a level not seen in almost 15 years.

item.title: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle respond to UK’s social media ban for under 16s
item.description: ‘The burden cannot rest solely on parents and children.’

item.title: Queensland captain Cameron Munster backs Tino Fa’asuamaleaui to fight through the pain of father’s death
item.description: ‘You lose your mentor or an idol or a role model of your family, especially your dad, it does take a heavy toll on you.’
